MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Cross-Complainant's Counsel is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 8/28/2006 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Beldon Yee, CSR#2647. (212)

MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Apr-26-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendants Halloway and Q Entertainment SF, LLC are ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 21 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond and failure to respond in a timely fashion was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant Halloway is ordered to pay monetary sanctions in the amount of $375 within 21 days of notice of this order. Defendant Q Entertainment SF, LLC is ordered to pay monetary sanctions in the amount of $375 within 21 days of notice of this order. The motion for terminating sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
